title: 700 GB log data size
body: ### Issue Description I hardly did use podman. Had kept it running in the background for months. And I found the size of the log file grew to 780 GB. /Users/<>/Library/Logs/Podman Desktop/launchd-stderr.log ### Steps to reproduce the issue Steps to reproduce the issue 1. Logs 2. Check at path /Users/<>/Library/Logs/Podman Desktop/launchd-stderr.log ### Describe the results you received Describe the results you received - 780 GB of log data. ### Describe the results you expected Periodically refreshed log data capped at 1 gb ### podman info output ```yaml No output ``` ### Podman in a container No ### Privileged Or Rootless None ### Upstream Latest Release Yes ### Additional environment details Additional environment details ### Additional information Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Hi, that looks like a Podman Desktop logfile. This is the Podman repository; you'll want to file this against Podman Desktop, at https://github.com/podman-desktop/podman-desktop
